title: Open-source agent governance market spikes after model release
summary: Traders are pricing in a sharp increase in demand for governed agent infrastructure after a major model launch.
signal_reason: High-volume market + direct relevance to autonomous tooling

title: New lightweight runtime graph for local agents
summary: A trending repo is gaining attention for low-latency local agent orchestration but lacks governance receipts and branch preservation.
signal_reason: Strong integration angle against current governed runtime stack

title: AI operations lead roles mention audit trails and human override
summary: Enterprise postings increasingly ask for agent governance, observability, and approval chains rather than pure prompt engineering.
signal_reason: Clear narrative fit for governance-focused content

title: Debate rises over whether agent swarms are mostly theater
summary: Developers are questioning whether multi-agent stacks have real authority models or only roleplay wrappers around one model.
